name: gemini-discord
description: Local Discord bridge that gives your existing Gemini CLI agent a Discord channel.

settings.name: Primary Discord Channel ID
settings.description: Optional override for the primary Discord channel ID. Leave blank to let the daemon remember the first owner channel automatically.

settings.name: Owner Discord User IDs
settings.description: Optional override for bridge owners. Leave blank to let the daemon infer the Discord application owner automatically when possible.
